title: Corymborkis longiflora

Corymborkis longiflora is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are traditionally used to treat various ailments, although its efficacy and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.

As part of the Orchidaceae family, Corymborkis longiflora is further categorized within the subfamily Epidendroideae, which includes many epiphytic orchids. The genus Corymborkis is a monotypic genus, consisting of a single species.
